text.text: Hey, <@__USER_ID__>! Welcome to Francesca Hong's Volunteer Workspace! We are really glad you are here. The trickiest part of getting involved is finding out where to start -- here are some resources for doing that!

Here, you can find an overview of our entire slack workspace, including an overview of our slack channels, who our staff and volunteer leadership is, and our community code of conduct that you will be expected to adhere to.
if you have any questions, please feel free to reach out to:
